name: employee_a_2
immutable_facts: A previous deduction did not go through.
The caller changed the card that morning because the old card had no money.
The caller tried three or four times.
A transfer was attempted at 09:03.
The caller heard the receiving account might be restricted or frozen.
The caller was told an account ending 1407 and a 44W Bank account were involved.
Another collector proposed company WeChat to send account details.
The caller will not open a wallet/banking app, read account details aloud, or use WeChat for payment instructions.

beats.goal: give only the challenge answer
report that the previous deduction did not go through
explain that the old card had no money and the card changed that morning
say the deduction failed again and it was tried three or four times
mention the 09:03 attempt and account ending 1407 without reading a full account number
say the caller heard the receiving account might be frozen or restricted
decline to open an OPPO wallet or banking app on the call
report that another collector wanted company WeChat to send account details and ask how to verify it
ask for an official written next step and say no payment will be made before it
ask not to receive repeated collection calls while the investigation is open

name: employee_b_2
immutable_facts: The caller went to a bank and contacted the platform.
The caller asks repeatedly for time and says they will try to resolve it today.
Amounts mentioned are 189.38, 199, and 2,089 yuan; they are disputed/uncertain speech figures and must not be treated as confirmed payment instructions.
The caller says they are at a police station and under serious pressure.
The caller says the repeated contact has affected them badly and asks the agent to stop contacting them.

beats.goal: give only the challenge answer
say the caller went to the bank after a platform message but cannot resolve it immediately
ask for time and say the caller will try to handle it today
repeat the uncertain figures 189.38, 199, and 2,089 yuan and ask for official written clarification
say the caller is not refusing responsibility but cannot make an immediate promise
say the pressure and repetition have affected the caller badly; request support rather than payment pressure
ask the agent not to contact the caller or repeat the same question
ask to end the call after confirming the contact preference

name: employee_a_1
immutable_facts: The caller cannot pay today and repeatedly says the pressure is too high.
The caller's income has fallen to around 4,000 yuan.
The caller says they cannot sleep and feels humiliated.
The caller will try tomorrow but cannot promise three or five days.
The caller objects to being told to involve family or facing an outside collection team.

beats.goal: give only the challenge answer
say the caller cannot pay today and the pressure is too high
say income has dropped to around 4,000 yuan
say the caller will try tomorrow but cannot promise three or five days
say the caller cannot sleep and feels humiliated by the pressure
object to involving family or threats of an outside collection team
ask for time and support rather than another demand

name: employee_b_1
immutable_facts: The caller paid several times but the system did not show it.
The caller is unsure which public account to use.
The caller was given a public account reference 5405.
The caller was asked repeatedly to add WeChat or QQ and was asked about a backup account.
The caller wants official written confirmation instead of chat-app payment details.

beats.goal: give only the challenge answer
say several payments were made but the system did not show them
say the caller is unsure which public account to use and mention reference 5405
report repeated requests to add WeChat or QQ for payment details
say a backup account was mentioned and ask why
ask for official written confirmation rather than chat-app instructions
